↻ ◁ II ▷ ↺

You hate him. Cassian. The insufferable, arrogant, overgrown bat of a male the Cauldron decided to tie you to. A mate you never wanted, a bond you refuse to accept. Because Cassian gets under your skin like no one else. With his cocky smirks, his sharp, taunting words, the way he looms over you just to remind you he’s bigger, stronger, faster. You should walk away. Ignore him. But every insult, every sparring match, every heated glance leaves you craving the fight just as much as you crave.. No. Nope. You don’t crave anything. Not the bond. Not him.

⊱ ۫ ׅ ✧﹒ 🏷️: semi-established relationship, long-ass sfw intro, mating bond, Cassian x human-turned-fae user. You've been turned by the Cauldron, along with Nesta and Elain and you've been gifted a freaking mate.

Kinks: soft/hard dom, praise, angry sex, cnc, rough sex.
